channel.title: service on Stephanie Hicks
channel.description: Recent content in service on Stephanie Hicks

item.title: ASA Committee on Women in Statistics Rotating Curators
item.description: For 2020, I am the Chair of the Committee on Women in Statistics (COWIS) from the American Statistical Association and Lucy D’Agostino McGowan from Wake Forest University is the Vice-Chair. As a committee we meet quarterly to discuss goals that we set for ourselves and progress to date on those goals. One of our goals is to make better use of the @WomenInStat twitter handle, which is run by members of our committee.
